items.html: And all these discernments are all in the name BON [52], except that there are two discernments in it. For the Achoraim [posterior] of this name, which in Gematria is AB [72] KADEM [144] — thus: Yod, Yod-Hey, Yod-Hey-Vav, Yod-Hey-Vav-Hey, which is 72 in Gematria, plainly; and Yod; Yod, Hey-Hey; Yod, Hey-Hey, Vav-Vav; Yod, Hey-Hey, Vav-Vav, Hey-Hey, which in its filling is KADEM [144] in Gematria — and the two of them together are RIU [216] in Gematria, Gevura: this is the discernment of the Kli [vessel]. But the name in its order, in its filling — thus: Yod-Vav-Dalet, Hey-Hey, Vav-Vav, Hey-Hey — is BON [52] in Gematria: this is the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] themselves. And there are many matters and many discernments in this, and they will be explained, God willing, in their place.
